title: Biomedical Microrobotics Lab
text:
Welcome to the Dexterous Microrobotics Lab.
Our research focuses on:

Optothermal microrobotics
Fibre-enabled robotic systems
Biomedical micro-manipulation
Minimally invasive robotic intervention
Microfabrication and 2PP systems















Dr. Belal Ahmad
Lecturer, University of Bath

title: Biomedical Microrobotics Lab
